## Dataset.representation property

In what form the data is presented in the ParaChart element.

**Signature:**

```typescript
representation: {
        type: "chart";
        subtype: "line" | "stepline" | "bar" | "column" | "lollipop" | "histogram" | "waterfall" | "scatter" | "heatmap" | "pie" | "donut" | "graph" | "venn";
        structure?: RepresentationStructure[];
    };
```
